description: Installer packaging infrastructure - Qt IFW config, CPack, build scripts, platform metadata files
steps: Create installer/ directory structure: config/, packages/com.threatone.core/meta/, packages/com.threatone.core/data/, packages/com.threatone.plugins/meta/, packages/com.threatone.plugins/data/

Create installer/config/config.xml: Qt IFW config with Title 'ThreatOne Enterprise', Version 1.0.0, Publisher 'ThreatOne Security Inc', TargetDir '@HomeDir@/ThreatOne', StartMenuDir 'ThreatOne Enterprise'.
Create installer/config/controller.js: IFW UI customization script (IntroductionPageCallback, TargetDirectoryPageCallback, ComponentSelectionPageCallback).
Create installer/packages/com.threatone.core/meta/package.xml: DisplayName, Description, Version, ReleaseDate, Default (true), Required (true).

Create installer/packages/com.threatone.core/meta/installscript.qs: Component.prototype.createOperations with CreateShortcut, RegisterFileType. Linux: create .desktop file, set permissions. Windows: create Start Menu shortcut.
Create scripts/build_installer.sh: bash script that runs cmake build then binarycreator to package installer (check for binarycreator availability).
Create scripts/build_installer.bat: Windows equivalent batch script.

Add CPack configuration to root CMakeLists.txt (behind option ENABLE_PACKAGING default OFF): include(CPack), set CPACK_GENERATOR to DEB;RPM;NSIS;DragNDrop based on platform, set CPACK_PACKAGE_* variables.
Create installer/linux/threatone.desktop: Linux .desktop file with Exec, Icon, Categories, Comment.
Create installer/macos/Info.plist.in: macOS Info.plist template with CFBundleIdentifier com.threatone.enterprise, CFBundleVersion @PROJECT_VERSION@.
Ensure build still compiles with ENABLE_QT=OFF (CPack section should be conditional or always-available metadata).
acceptance_criteria: scripts/build_installer.sh is executable and has correct shebang
CPack variables are set in CMakeLists.txt behind ENABLE_PACKAGING option
